title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
summary: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

title: TradFi advisers want stablecoins, tokenization over Bitcoin: Bitwise
summary: Bitwise’s Matt Hougan says it was “pretty hard to engage with advisers on Bitcoin” during recent discussions, who are more interested in stablecoins and tokenization.

title: Gold Swings in Volatile Session After Fresh US-Iran Strikes
summary: Gold fluctuated after hitting the lowest since November, following a fresh round of US strikes against Iran that raised the stakes in a war that has roiled global markets and stoked inflation.

title: Greek LNG Buyer Says Long-Term US Deals Getting More Difficult
summary: The boss of Greece’s Atlantic SEE LNG Trade said it’s becoming more difficult to secure long-term liquefied natural gas deals with US suppliers, after the Iran war upended the global market.

title: Google's DiffusionGemma AI Hits 1,000 Tokens Per Second—And It's Free
summary: DiffusionGemma hits 1,000 tokens per second by ditching word-by-word generation entirely. It just doesn't run on most people's machines yet.

title: Anthropic CEO Warns AI Is Getting Too Powerful—While Releasing Powerful AI
summary: In a new essay, Dario Amodei called for binding safety rules for frontier models as his company heads toward an IPO.

title: South Korean police book Bithumb CEO as bribery suspect in lawmaker hiring probe: report
summary: Police are investigating whether Bithumb CEO Lee hired lawmaker Kim's son as a favor and whether Kim later used his position to target Upbit.

title: Figure to acquire Kiavi for $717 million to expand RWA tokenization network
